verification_method: Antique 1890s aneroid barometer. Numeric scale visible: 720, 730, 740, 750, 760, 770, 780, 790. Black needle points directly between 770 and 780 mark, closer to 770. Reading approximately 770 mmHg. Weather labels (Variable, Bau Temps, Bau Fixe) confirm orientation. High confidence.
